projectName: Blackmagic Design DaVinci Resolve 20 Fairlight Audio Guide

tier1Committed.fileName: Copy of Copy of project Media Metadata.csv

notes: r2n-test-4 is an official Fairlight multichannel baseline derived from Blackmagic training material.
Tier 1 is sufficient for committed lightweight importer, reconciliation, delivery-planning, execution-prep, staging, and package-contract checks for r2n-test-4.
Tier 2 stays local-only so the Fairlight .dra bundle, reference video, and large otioz do not become part of normal repo verification.
This sample is editorial plus audio-structure baseline only. It does not claim production-audio or field-recorder proof.
The lightweight metadata preserves at least one 8-channel clip and confirms multichannel layout inference without requiring direct media reads.
